reviews.comment:
Mala atención en el serví compras , poca predisposición del personal , esperamos 40 min una hamburguesa , y no tenían ni siquiera tomate , no recomiendo el lugar

(Translated by Google)
Bad service at the shopping service, unwilling staff, we waited 40 minutes for a hamburger, and they didn't even have tomato, I don't recommend the place

reviews.comment:
Baños muy limpios. Buena atención.  Si hay mucha gente esperando PREGUNTAR PRIMERO si queda del combustible a cargar. Hicimos 20 min de espera y no tenían Super

(Translated by Google)
Very clean restrooms. Good service. If there's a long line, ASK FIRST if they have any fuel left. We waited 20 minutes and they didn't have Super.
